No Poverty.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly or indirectly relates to poverty eradication or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to food security, nutrition, agricultural productivity, or sustainable food systems.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to health outcomes, disease prevention, mental health, or access to healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: As a university lab course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops technical skills in digital systems for future employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: 學習數位電路與系統的設計方法
從做中學，藉由實驗，實際操作

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to gender disparities, discrimination, violence, or equal opportunities for women and girls.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to water access, sanitation, water quality, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course fosters innovation and provides technical skills in digital systems, contributing to economic productivity and technological upgrading in high-value sectors (Target 8.2).
evidence: 培養邏輯推理、獨立思考與創新能力
瞭解資訊科技發展趨勢

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly builds capacity for technological innovation (Target 9.5) by teaching digital circuit and system design methods and fostering an understanding of IT development trends.
evidence: 學習數位電路與系統的設計方法
培養邏輯推理、獨立思考與創新能力
瞭解資訊科技發展趨勢

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to income growth, social inclusion, equal opportunity, or reducing discriminatory practices.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to urban planning, housing, transport, heritage, or environmental impact of cities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to sustainable consumption, resource efficiency, waste reduction, or sustainable business practices.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or resilience to climate-related hazards.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, ocean pollution, or sustainable use of marine resources.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course promotes 'professional and ethical responsibility' and 'Respect Copyright,' which contribute to the rule of law and accountable institutions (Target 16.3).
evidence: 具有專業及道德責任的認知
維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍。 Respect Copyright.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus relates to global partnerships, financial resources, technology transfer, or capacity building for SDGs.
